workplan: Document the correct two-step booking flow
decisions_made: Step 1: POST /api/request runs 4 agents and returns options
Step 2: POST /api/book confirms and creates booking
User must explicitly confirm before booking is created
This prevents accidental bookings and unnecessary Firestore writes
errors_encountered: Original pipeline ran all 7 agents automatically
This caused bookings to be created without user confirmation
Caused unnecessary Firestore writes on every test
outcome: Two step flow implemented. /api/request for discovery, /api/book for confirmation.
